description: Notice of Readiness on arrival at Piraeus

source.row_text: NOR Tendered Master tendered Notice of Readiness on arrival at Piraeus (UTC) 08:00 port limits.
NOR Accepted NOR accepted by port authority. 14:00

description: Vessel alongside Berth 7. First grab into Hold 1. Laytime commenced.

source.row_text: Loading Vessel alongside Berth 7. First grab into Hold 1. Laytime Commenced commenced. 20:00

description: Laytime allowance of 72 hours fully consumed. Vessel on demurrage from this time.

source.row_text: Laytime Expired Laytime allowance of 72 hours fully consumed. Vessel on demurrage from this time. 20:00

description: All hatches closed. Final draft survey complete. Vessel ready to sail.

source.row_text: Loading All hatches closed. Final draft survey complete. Vessel ready to sail. 13:46
